options.command: cd apps/smart-suggest && ([ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts) && pnpm build
cd apps/smart-suggest && ([ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts) && pnpm check
cd apps/smart-suggest && ([ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts) && pnpm cloudflare:build
cd apps/smart-suggest && ([ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts) && pnpm typecheck
